title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 and Z Fold 8 Ultra News Briefing
description: Recent coverage highlights the Galaxy Z Fold 8, Z Fold 8 Ultra, and Z Flip 8 following the July 2026 Galaxy Unpacked event.

sections.heading: Galaxy Unpacked July 2026
paragraphs: According to Samsung Global Newsroom, the Galaxy Unpacked July 2026 event provided a first look at the Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra, Galaxy Z Fold8, and Galaxy Z Flip8.

sections.heading: Hands-on Reviews
paragraphs: GSMArena.com published a hands-on review covering the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8, Z Fold8 Ultra, and Z Flip8.

sections.heading: Exclusive Photos and Colors
paragraphs: Android Headlines reported on exclusive family photos for the Galaxy Z Fold 8, Flip 8, Watch 9, and Watch Ultra 2. The source also mentioned two online-exclusive colors.

sections.heading: Search Interest
paragraphs: The term "z fold 8" has a search lower bound of 1000 in the VN region according to the provided data. Google Trends data reflects the popularity of search terms over a specific period.

faq.q: What devices were showcased at Galaxy Unpacked July 2026?
faq.a: According to Samsung Global Newsroom, the event showcased the Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra, Galaxy Z Fold8, and Galaxy Z Flip8.

faq.q: Are there reviews available for the new devices?
faq.a: Yes, GSMArena.com has published a hands-on review for the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8, Z Fold8 Ultra, and Z Flip8.

faq.q: What other products were mentioned in recent coverage?
faq.a: Android Headlines mentioned the Galaxy Z Fold 8, Flip 8, Watch 9, and Watch Ultra 2 in a report featuring family photos and online-exclusive colors.
